task_completion.description: Locate the patient profile for Angela Rivera.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a search query for 'Angela Rivera' or the patient's dashboard/profile page displaying her name.

task_completion.description: Open the interface to edit the patient's address or demographic information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing an open form, modal, or edit page specifically for updating contact details, demographics, or address information for Angela Rivera.

task_completion.description: Enter the new street address into the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing '4521 Pine Ridge Drive' typed into the Address 1 or Street Address input field.

task_completion.description: Enter the new city, state, postal code, and country into the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing 'Austin' in the City field, 'Texas' (or 'TX') in the State/Province field, '78745' in the Postal/Zip Code field, and 'United States' in the Country field.

task_completion.description: Save the changes and verify the updated address is displayed on the patient's profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the patient profile or dashboard after saving, clearly displaying the new address (4521 Pine Ridge Drive, Austin, TX 78745) and no longer showing the old city (San Francisco).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual clinic/medical application GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The address updates are typed into the web browser or application interface, not into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing database queries (e.g., SQL updates) or API requests (e.g., curl) used to update the patient's address.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final result.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to manually alter the HTML text to show the new address.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The patient to update is 'Angela Rivera'. The initial city on her profile is 'San Francisco'. The target address values to verify are: Street: '4521 Pine Ridge Drive', City: 'Austin', State: 'Texas' (or 'TX'), Postal Code: '78745', Country: 'United States'.
